promoted_facts.fact: Hyatt Place Franchising, L.L.C. unaudited balance sheet shows total assets of $72,031,707 and member's equity of $53,205,466 as of December 31, 2024
Reservations length of stay breakdown: 78.8% for 1-4 nights, 15.8% for 5-11 nights, 3.3% for 12-29 nights, 2.4% for 30+ nights
Some Covered Hotels are joint ventures with affiliate owning <50% interest, classified as Franchised Covered Hotels
Hyatt Hotels Corporation share repurchases: $1,190M in 2024, $453M in 2023, $369M in 2022. Dividends: $60M in 2024.
Acquisitions net of cash: $609M in 2024, $175M in 2023, $174M in 2022
Loyalty program deferred revenue liability of $1,333M is actuarially determined including breakage estimate. Funds deposited in segregated accounts. Independent annual audit.
Pre-opening marketing requires spending at least $500 × number of guest rooms, submitted 120 days before opening
Revenue manager must be certified within 90 days, may manage max 20 Brand Hotels, must have authorized access to reservation system
